title: AI Basics Day 1
description: Kickstart your 30-day AI journey with Day 1 of AI Basics for Developers. Learn the fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence and how to apply them in your projects. From machine learning to deep learning, get ready to unlock the power of AI. Subscribe for daily AI tutorials and become an expert in AI development. Join our community to stay updated on the latest AI trends and best practices. Don't forget to like and share this video to help others learn AI.
thumbnail_prompt: A robot and a developer working together with code and gears in the background.
